items.summary: Create a Classifieds page (route: /classifieds) accessible from the top navigation bar alongside the existing five links. The page should be fully styled in the 1970s retro / early 2000s athletic crossover theme consistent with the rest of the app.

Build a static library of at least 30 fake spoof classified ads written in 1970s Mad Magazine / National Lampoon satirical voice with adult humor and cussing allowed (no real-person defamation). Categories should include: FOR SALE (absurd junk), PERSONALS (outrageous lonely-hearts), HELP WANTED (ridiculous job listings), SERVICES OFFERED (quack remedies, con-artist trades), LOST & FOUND, and ANNOUNCEMENTS. Each ad entry should have: a category label, a bold headline, ad body text (1–4 lines), and an optional fake phone number or PO Box.

Render the classifieds on the Classifieds page in a multi-column newspaper-style grid layout. Ads should be grouped by category with bold category headers (e.g., '★ FOR SALE ★', '♥ PERSONALS ♥') as section dividers styled with retro ornamental borders and diagonal stripe accents. Each ad card should have a typewriter-style monospace body, retro border, and subtle aged-paper background.

Add a 'Place Your Own Ad' submission form at the top or bottom of the Classifieds page. Users select a category from a dropdown, enter a headline (max 60 chars) and ad body (max 200 chars), then submit. Submitted ads are stored in localStorage and appear at the top of the relevant category section. Each user-submitted ad should display a fake auto-generated 1970s-style username (reuse the existing soapboxUtils fake username generator) and a submission timestamp.
